variance_explanation: Two major deals slipped to February: Acme Corp $120K (procurement delayed) and TechStart $80K (budget freeze). Timing-related variance.
Unexpected enterprise deal closed early (GlobalTech $45K). Strong Q1 performance.
Implementation project delayed by 2 weeks due to customer resource constraints.
Higher contractor costs due to skill shortage in cloud migration projects.
Unplanned trade show participation ($18K) and additional headcount hired in December.
Lower commissions due to revenue miss. Directly correlated to deal slippage.
Digital campaign overspend ($7K) to support Q1 pipeline generation.
Cloud infrastructure costs increased 4% due to higher-than-expected user growth.
Emergency security patch deployment and additional AWS costs.
